Description: Summon your little mermaid minion. Wishes to be a little part of your world.
DescriptionEnhanced: Legends pertaining to mermaids are common in the Corvos region, foremost among them the tale of a mermaid princess who falls in love with a man. Perhaps influenced by said tale, this diminutive entity born of an arcane pattern in an illuminated manuscript has chosen to accompany you on your journeys.
SpecialActionDescription:
Delivers an attack with a potency of 60 to all enemies within range while reducing movement speed by 70%.
**Duration:** 10s

Description: Summon your magic lamp minion. Phenomenal cosmic powers in an itty-bitty living space.
DescriptionEnhanced: Manifesting from an arcane pattern in an illuminated manuscript, this oil lamp appears to be home to a genie. Unlike the lamp-dwelling spirit of Corvosi legend that grants wishes, however, this one is hesitant to show itself, perhaps needing more time to decide whether you are a worthy master.
Tooltip:
It's probably some source of phenomenal
cosmic power that's key to his plans.
   - Cid Garlond
SpecialActionDescription:
Increases action party movement speed by 30%. 
**Duration:** 10s

Description: Summon your wind-up Red XIII. He is that which you see before you. Nothing less.
DescriptionEnhanced: Legends tell of a four-legged beast, one of the last of his long-lived kind, who was possessed of reason and capable of speech. After escaping his captivity at a research facility, he cast aside his specimen designation, and with his new comrades went on to fight for the fate of the very star.
Tooltip:
I saw a flash of red in that instant.
   - Lalah Jinjahl
SpecialActionDescription:
Delivers an attack with a potency of 80 to all enemies within range while reducing DEF by 13%.
**Duration:** 6s

Description: Summon your soothing sea-beast minion. To simply behold its pleasing form is to be soothed to the soul.
DescriptionEnhanced: Born of an arcane pattern in an illuminated manuscript, this entity assumes the likeness of the young of a sea creature native to the Corvosi coastline. The pastel hues of its iridescent skin allow it to blend in with the coral reefs it calls home, and it is believed to be kin to mermaids.
Tooltip:
Pshhh... Your seabeast
sssteed awaits!
   - Novv
SpecialActionDescription:
Reduces ATK of all enemies within range by 50%.
**Duration:** 15s
